3	class StoriesController < ApplicationController
4	  include StoryFinder
5	
6	  content_security_policy(only: :show) do |policy|
7	    policy.img_src :self, :data, -> { @story&.can_have_images? ? "https:" : "" }
8	  end
9	
10	  caches_page :show, if: CACHE_PAGE
11	
12	  before_action :require_logged_in_user_or_400,
13	    only: [:upvote, :flag, :unvote, :hide, :unhide, :preview, :save, :unsave]
14	  before_action :require_logged_in_user,
15	    only: [:destroy, :create, :edit, :fetch_url_attributes, :new]
16	  before_action :verify_user_can_submit_stories, only: [:new, :create]
17	  before_action :find_user_story, only: [:destroy, :edit, :undelete, :update]
18	  around_action :track_story_reads, only: [:show], if: -> { @user.present? }
19	  before_action :show_title_h1, only: [:new, :edit]
20	
21	  def create
22	    return preview if params[:preview]
23	
24	    @title = "Submit Story"
25	
26	    @story = Story.new(user: @user)
27	    update_story_attributes
28	    update_resubmit_comment_attributes
29	
30	    if @story.valid? &&
31	        !@story.already_posted_recently? &&
32	        (!@story.is_resubmit? || @comment.valid?)
33	
34	      Story.transaction do
35	        if @story.save && (!@story.is_resubmit? || @comment.save)
36	          redirect_to Routes.title_path @story
37	
38	          if !Rails.env.development?
39	            SendWebmentionJob.set(wait: 5.minutes).perform_later(@story)
40	          end
41	
42	          CreateStoryCardJob.perform_later(@story)
43	        else
44	          raise ActiveRecord::Rollback
45	        end
46	      end
47	    elsif @story.new_user_acculturation_error
48	      flash[:error] = @story.errors.full_messages.join(" ")
49	      redirect_to mod_mail_path(id: @story.new_user_acculturation_error)
50	    else
51	      render action: "new"
52	    end
53	  end
54	
55	  def destroy
56	    if !@story.is_editable_by_user?(@user) && !@user.is_moderator?
57	      flash[:error] = "You cannot edit that story."
58	      return redirect_to "/"
59	    end
60	
61	    update_story_attributes
62	    @story.is_deleted = true
63	    @story.editor = @user
64	
65	    if @story.save
66	      Keystore.increment_value_for("user:#{@story.user.id}:stories_deleted")
67	      Mastodon.delete_post(@story)
68	    end
69	
70	    redirect_to Routes.title_path @story
71	  end
72	
73	  def edit
74	    if !@story.is_editable_by_user?(@user)
75	      flash[:error] = "You cannot edit that story."
76	      return redirect_to "/"
77	    end
78	
79	    @title = "Edit Story"
80	  end
81	
82	  def fetch_url_attributes
83	    s = Story.new
84	    s.fetching_ip = request.remote_ip
85	    s.url = params[:fetch_url]
86	
87	    render json: s.fetched_attributes
88	  end
89	
90	  def new
91	    @title = "Submit Story"
92	
93	    @story = Story.new(user_id: @user.id)
94	    @story.fetching_ip = request.remote_ip
95	
96	    if params[:url].present?
97	      @story.url = params[:url]
98	      sattrs = @story.fetched_attributes
99	
100	      if sattrs[:url].present? && @story.url != sattrs[:url]
101	        flash.now[:notice] = "Note: URL has been changed to fetched " \
102	          "canonicalized version"
103	        @story.url = sattrs[:url]
104	      end
105	
106	      if @story.already_posted_recently?
107	        # user won't be able to submit this story as new, so just redirect
108	        # them to the previous story
109	        flash[:success] = "This URL has already been submitted recently."
110	        return redirect_to Routes.title_path @story.most_recent_similar
111	      end
112	
113	      update_resubmit_comment_attributes
114	
115	      # ignore what the user brought unless we need it as a fallback
116	      @story.title = sattrs[:title]
117	      if @story.title.blank? && params[:title].present?
118	        @story.title = params[:title]
119	      end
120	    end
121	  end
122	
123	  def preview
124	    @story = Story.new
125	    update_story_attributes
126	    update_resubmit_comment_attributes
127	    @story.user_id = @user.id
128	    @story.previewing = true
129	
130	    @story.current_vote = Vote.new(vote: 1)
131	    @story.score = 1
132	
133	    @story.valid?
134	    @merged_stories = [@story]
135	
136	    render action: "new", layout: !request.xhr?
137	  end
138	
139	  def show
140	    # @story was already loaded by track_story_reads for logged-in users
141	    @story ||= Story.where(short_id: params[:id]).first!
142	    if @story.merged_into_story
143	      respond_to do |format|
144	        format.html {
145	          flash[:success] = "\"#{@story.title}\" has been merged into this story."
146	          return redirect_to Routes.title_path @story.merged_into_story, anchor: @story.header_anchor
147	        }
148	        format.json {
149	          return redirect_to(story_path(@story.merged_into_story, format: :json))
150	        }
151	      end
152	    end
153	
154	    # if asking with a title and it's been edited, 302
155	    if params[:title] && params[:title] != @story.title_as_slug
156	      return redirect_to(Routes.title_path(@story))
157	    end
158	
159	    if @story.is_gone?
160	      @moderation = Moderation
161	        .where(story: @story, comment: nil)
162	        .where("action LIKE '%deleted story%'")
163	        .order(id: :desc)
164	        .first
165	    end
166	    if !@story.can_be_seen_by_user?(@user)
167	      respond_to do |format|
168	        format.html { return render action: "_missing", status: 404, locals: {story: @story, moderation: @moderation} }
169	        format.json { raise ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound }
170	      end
171	    end
172	
173	    @comments = Comment.story_threads(@story).for_presentation
174	    @read_by_notifications = @user ? Comment.where(story_id: [@story.id] + @story.merged_stories.pluck(:id)).where(id: @user.notifications.read.of_comments) : []
175	
176	    @title = @story.title
177	
178	    respond_to do |format|
179	      format.html {
180	        @meta_tags = [
181	          {property: "og:type", content: "article"},
182	          {property: "og:site_name", content: Rails.application.name},
183	          {property: "og:title", content: @story.title},
184	          {property: "og:description", content: @story.comments_count.to_s + " " + "comment".pluralize(@story.comments_count)},
185	          {property: "og:image", content: Routes.story_image_url(@story)},
186	          {property: "article:author", content: Routes.user_url(@story.user)}
187	        ]
188	        @meta_tags << {property: "article:author", content: "https://#{@story.user.mastodon_instance}/@#{@story.user.mastodon_username}"} if @story.user.mastodon_username.present?
189	
190	        load_user_votes
191	
192	        @merged_stories = [@story, @story.merged_stories.not_deleted(@user).mod_single_preload?(@user).for_presentation.includes(:votes)].flatten
193	        render action: "show"
194	      }
195	      format.json {
196	        @comments = @comments.includes(:parent_comment)
197	        render json: @story.as_json(with_comments: @comments)
198	      }
199	    end
200	  end
201	
202	  def undelete
203	    if !(@story.is_editable_by_user?(@user) &&
204	    @story.is_undeletable_by_user?(@user))
205	      flash[:error] = "You cannot edit that story."
206	      return redirect_to "/"
207	    end
208	
209	    update_story_attributes
210	    @story.is_deleted = false
211	    @story.editor = @user
212	
213	    if @story.save
214	      Keystore.increment_value_for("user:#{@story.user.id}:stories_deleted", -1)
215	    end
216	
217	    redirect_to Routes.title_path @story
218	  end
219	
220	  def update
221	    if !@story.is_editable_by_user?(@user)
222	      flash[:error] = "You cannot edit that story."
223	      return redirect_to "/"
224	    end
225	
226	    @story.last_edited_at = Time.current
227	    @story.is_deleted = false
228	    @story.editor = @user
229	    update_story_attributes
230	
231	    if @story.save
232	      if @story.saved_change_to_url?
233	        CreateStoryCardJob.perform_later(@story)
234	      end
235	
236	      redirect_to Routes.title_path @story
237	    else
238	      render action: "edit"
239	    end
240	  end
241	
242	  def unvote
243	    if !(story = find_story) || story.is_gone?
244	      return render plain: "can't find story", status: 400
245	    end
246	
247	    Vote.vote_thusly_on_story_or_comment_for_user_because(
248	      0, story.id, nil, @user.id, nil
249	    )
250	
251	    render plain: "ok"
252	  end
253	
254	  def upvote
255	    if !(story = find_story) || story.is_gone?
256	      return render plain: "can't find story", status: 400
257	    end
258	
259	    if story.merged_into_story
260	      return render plain: "story has been merged", status: 400
261	    end
262	
263	    Vote.vote_thusly_on_story_or_comment_for_user_because(
264	      1, story.id, nil, @user.id, nil
265	    )
266	
267	    render plain: "ok"
268	  end
269	
270	  def flag
271	    if !(story = find_story) || story.is_gone?
272	      return render plain: "can't find story", status: 400
273	    end
274	
275	    if !Vote::STORY_REASONS[params[:reason]]
276	      return render plain: "invalid reason", status: 400
277	    end
278	
279	    if !@user.can_flag?(story)
280	      return render plain: "not permitted to flag", status: 400
281	    end
282	
283	    Vote.vote_thusly_on_story_or_comment_for_user_because(
284	      -1, story.id, nil, @user.id, params[:reason]
285	    )
286	
287	    render plain: "ok"
288	  end
289	
290	  def hide
291	    error =
292	      if !(story = find_story)
293	        "Can't find story"
294	      elsif story.merged_into_story
295	        "Story has been merged"
296	      end
297	
298	    if error
299	      respond_to do |format|
300	        format.html {
301	          flash[:error] = error
302	          redirect_to "/"
303	        }
304	        format.json {
305	          render json: {message: error}, status: 400
306	        }
307	      end
308	      return
309	    end
310	
311	    HiddenStory.hide_story_for_user(story, @user)
312	
313	    respond_to do |format|
314	      format.html {
315	        flash[:success] = "Story hidden."
316	        redirect_back_or_to Routes.title_path(story)
317	      }
318	      format.json {
319	        render json: {hidden: true, nextAction: story_unhide_path(story.short_id)}, status: :ok
320	      }
321	    end
322	  end
323	
324	  def unhide
325	    if !(story = find_story)
326	      error = "Can't find story"
327	
328	      respond_to do |format|
329	        format.html {
330	          flash[:error] = error
331	          redirect_to "/"
332	        }
333	        format.json {
334	          render json: {message: error}, status: 400
335	        }
336	      end
337	      return
338	    end
339	
340	    HiddenStory.unhide_story_for_user(story, @user)
341	
342	    respond_to do |format|
343	      format.html {
344	        flash[:success] = "Story unhidden."
345	        redirect_back_or_to Routes.title_path(story)
346	      }
347	      format.json {
348	        render json: {hidden: false, nextAction: story_hide_path(story.short_id)}, status: :ok
349	      }
350	    end
351	  end
352	
353	  def save
354	    error =
355	      if !(story = find_story)
356	        "Can't find story"
357	      elsif story.merged_into_story
358	        "Story has been merged"
359	      end
360	
361	    if error
362	      respond_to do |format|
363	        format.html {
364	          flash[:error] = error
365	          redirect_to "/"
366	        }
367	        format.json {
368	          render json: {message: error}, status: 400
369	        }
370	      end
371	      return
372	    end
373	
374	    SavedStory.save_story_for_user(story.id, @user.id)
375	
376	    respond_to do |format|
377	      format.html {
378	        flash[:success] = "Story saved."
379	        redirect_back_or_to Routes.title_path(story)
380	      }
381	      format.json {
382	        render json: {saved: true, nextAction: story_unsave_path(story.short_id)}, status: :ok
383	      }
384	    end
385	  end
386	
387	  def unsave
388	    if !(story = find_story)
389	      error = "Can't find story."
390	
391	      respond_to do |format|
392	        format.html {
393	          flash[:error] = error
394	          redirect_to "/"
395	        }
396	        format.json {
397	          render json: {message: error}, status: 400
398	        }
399	      end
400	      return
401	    end
402	
403	    SavedStory.where(user_id: @user.id, story_id: story.id).delete_all
404	
405	    respond_to do |format|
406	      format.html {
407	        flash[:success] = "Story unsaved."
408	        redirect_back_or_to Routes.title_path(story)
409	      }
410	      format.json {
411	        render json: {saved: false, nextAction: story_save_path(story.short_id)}, status: :ok
412	      }
413	    end
414	  end
415	
416	  def check_url_dupe
417	    raise ActionController::ParameterMissing.new("No URL") if params.dig(:story, :url).blank?
418	    @story = Story.new(user: @user)
419	    update_story_attributes
420	    update_resubmit_comment_attributes
421	    @story.check_already_posted_recently?
422	
423	    respond_to do |format|
424	      linking_comments = Link.recently_linked_from_comments(@story.url)
425	      format.html {
426	        return render partial: "stories/form_errors", layout: false,
427	          content_type: "text/html", locals: {
428	            linking_comments: linking_comments,
429	            story: @story
430	          }
431	      }
432	      # json: https://github.com/lobsters/lobsters/pull/555
433	      format.json {
434	        similar_stories = @story.public_similar_stories(@user).map(&:as_json)
435	        render json: @story.as_json.merge(similar_stories: similar_stories)
436	      }
437	    end
438	  end
439	
440	  def disown
441	    if !((story = find_story) && story.disownable_by_user?(@user))
442	      return render plain: "can't find story", status: 400
443	    end
444	
445	    InactiveUser.disown! story
446	
447	    redirect_to Routes.title_path story
448	  end
449	
450	  private
451	
452	  def story_params
453	    ps = params.require(:story).permit(:title, :url, :description, :user_is_author, :user_is_following, tags: [])
454	    ps[:tags] = Tag.where(tag: ps[:tags] || @story.tags.map(&:tag), active: true)
455	    ps
456	  end
457	
458	  def update_story_attributes
459	    @story.tags_was = @story.tags.to_a
460	    @story.attributes = if @story.url_is_editable_by_user?(@user)
461	      story_params
462	    else
463	      story_params.except(:url)
464	    end
465	  end
466	
467	  def update_resubmit_comment_attributes
468	    if @story.is_resubmit?
469	      @comment = @story.comments.new(user: @user)
470	      @comment.comment = params[:comment]
471	      @comment.hat = @user.wearable_hats.find_by(short_id: params[:hat_id])
472	    end
473	  end
474	
475	  def find_user_story
476	    @story = if @user.is_moderator?
477	      Story.where(short_id: params[:story_id] || params[:id]).first
478	    else
479	      Story.where(user_id: @user.id, short_id: params[:story_id] || params[:id]).first
480	    end
481	
482	    if !@story
483	      flash[:error] = "Could not find story or you are not authorized " \
484	        "to manage it."
485	      redirect_to "/"
486	      false
487	    end
488	  end
489	
490	  def load_user_votes
491	    if @user
492	      @story.current_vote = Vote.find_by(user: @user, story: @story, comment: nil)
493	
494	      @story.is_hidden_by_cur_user = @story.is_hidden_by_user?(@user)
495	      @story.is_saved_by_cur_user = @story.is_saved_by_user?(@user)
496	      @comments = CommentVoteHydrator.new(@comments, @user)
497	    end
498	  end
499	
500	  def verify_user_can_submit_stories
501	    if !@user.can_submit_stories?
502	      flash[:error] = "You are not allowed to submit new stories."
503	      redirect_to "/"
504	    end
505	  end
506	
507	  def track_story_reads
508	    @story = Story.where(short_id: params[:id]).mod_single_preload?(@user).first!
509	    @ribbon = ReadRibbon.where(user: @user, story: @story).first_or_initialize
510	    yield
511	    @ribbon.bump
512	  end
513	end
514

file.content:
# typed: false

class StoriesController < ApplicationController
  include StoryFinder

  content_security_policy(only: :show) do |policy|
    policy.img_src :self, :data, -> { @story&.can_have_images? ? "https:" : "" }
  end

  caches_page :show, if: CACHE_PAGE

  before_action :require_logged_in_user_or_400,
    only: [:upvote, :flag, :unvote, :hide, :unhide, :preview, :save, :unsave]
  before_action :require_logged_in_user,
    only: [:destroy, :create, :edit, :fetch_url_attributes, :new]
  before_action :verify_user_can_submit_stories, only: [:new, :create]
  before_action :find_user_story, only: [:destroy, :edit, :undelete, :update]
  around_action :track_story_reads, only: [:show], if: -> { @user.present? }
  before_action :show_title_h1, only: [:new, :edit]

  def create
    return preview if params[:preview]

    @title = "Submit Story"

    @story = Story.new(user: @user)
    update_story_attributes
    update_resubmit_comment_attributes

    if @story.valid? &&
        !@story.already_posted_recently? &&
        (!@story.is_resubmit? || @comment.valid?)

      Story.transaction do
        if @story.save && (!@story.is_resubmit? || @comment.save)
          redirect_to Routes.title_path @story

          if !Rails.env.development?
            SendWebmentionJob.set(wait: 5.minutes).perform_later(@story)
          end

          CreateStoryCardJob.perform_later(@story)
        else
          raise ActiveRecord::Rollback
        end
      end
    elsif @story.new_user_acculturation_error
      flash[:error] = @story.errors.full_messages.join(" ")
      redirect_to mod_mail_path(id: @story.new_user_acculturation_error)
    else
      render action: "new"
    end
  end

  def destroy
    if !@story.is_editable_by_user?(@user) && !@user.is_moderator?
      flash[:error] = "You cannot edit that story."
      return redirect_to "/"
    end

    update_story_attributes
    @story.is_deleted = true
    @story.editor = @user

    if @story.save
      Keystore.increment_value_for("user:#{@story.user.id}:stories_deleted")
      Mastodon.delete_post(@story)
    end

    redirect_to Routes.title_path @story
  end

  def edit
    if !@story.is_editable_by_user?(@user)
      flash[:error] = "You cannot edit that story."
      return redirect_to "/"
    end

    @title = "Edit Story"
  end

  def fetch_url_attributes
    s = Story.new
    s.fetching_ip = request.remote_ip
    s.url = params[:fetch_url]

    render json: s.fetched_attributes
  end

  def new
    @title = "Submit Story"

    @story = Story.new(user_id: @user.id)
    @story.fetching_ip = request.remote_ip

    if params[:url].present?
      @story.url = params[:url]
      sattrs = @story.fetched_attributes

      if sattrs[:url].present? && @story.url != sattrs[:url]
        flash.now[:notice] = "Note: URL has been changed to fetched " \
          "canonicalized version"
        @story.url = sattrs[:url]
      end

      if @story.already_posted_recently?
        # user won't be able to submit this story as new, so just redirect
        # them to the previous story
        flash[:success] = "This URL has already been submitted recently."
        return redirect_to Routes.title_path @story.most_recent_similar
      end

      update_resubmit_comment_attributes

      # ignore what the user brought unless we need it as a fallback
      @story.title = sattrs[:title]
      if @story.title.blank? && params[:title].present?
        @story.title = params[:title]
      end
    end
  end

  def preview
    @story = Story.new
    update_story_attributes
    update_resubmit_comment_attributes
    @story.user_id = @user.id
    @story.previewing = true

    @story.current_vote = Vote.new(vote: 1)
    @story.score = 1

    @story.valid?
    @merged_stories = [@story]

    render action: "new", layout: !request.xhr?
  end

  def show
    # @story was already loaded by track_story_reads for logged-in users
    @story ||= Story.where(short_id: params[:id]).first!
    if @story.merged_into_story
      respond_to do |format|
        format.html {
          flash[:success] = "\"#{@story.title}\" has been merged into this story."
          return redirect_to Routes.title_path @story.merged_into_story, anchor: @story.header_anchor
        }
        format.json {
          return redirect_to(story_path(@story.merged_into_story, format: :json))
        }
      end
    end

    # if asking with a title and it's been edited, 302
    if params[:title] && params[:title] != @story.title_as_slug
      return redirect_to(Routes.title_path(@story))
    end

    if @story.is_gone?
      @moderation = Moderation
        .where(story: @story, comment: nil)
        .where("action LIKE '%deleted story%'")
        .order(id: :desc)
        .first
    end
    if !@story.can_be_seen_by_user?(@user)
      respond_to do |format|
        format.html { return render action: "_missing", status: 404, locals: {story: @story, moderation: @moderation} }
        format.json { raise ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound }
      end
    end

    @comments = Comment.story_threads(@story).for_presentation
    @read_by_notifications = @user ? Comment.where(story_id: [@story.id] + @story.merged_stories.pluck(:id)).where(id: @user.notifications.read.of_comments) : []

    @title = @story.title

    respond_to do |format|
      format.html {
        @meta_tags = [
          {property: "og:type", content: "article"},
          {property: "og:site_name", content: Rails.application.name},
          {property: "og:title", content: @story.title},
          {property: "og:description", content: @story.comments_count.to_s + " " + "comment".pluralize(@story.comments_count)},
          {property: "og:image", content: Routes.story_image_url(@story)},
          {property: "article:author", content: Routes.user_url(@story.user)}
        ]
        @meta_tags << {property: "article:author", content: "https://#{@story.user.mastodon_instance}/@#{@story.user.mastodon_username}"} if @story.user.mastodon_username.present?

        load_user_votes

        @merged_stories = [@story, @story.merged_stories.not_deleted(@user).mod_single_preload?(@user).for_presentation.includes(:votes)].flatten
        render action: "show"
      }
      format.json {
        @comments = @comments.includes(:parent_comment)
        render json: @story.as_json(with_comments: @comments)
      }
    end
  end

  def undelete
    if !(@story.is_editable_by_user?(@user) &&
    @story.is_undeletable_by_user?(@user))
      flash[:error] = "You cannot edit that story."
      return redirect_to "/"
    end

    update_story_attributes
    @story.is_deleted = false
    @story.editor = @user

    if @story.save
      Keystore.increment_value_for("user:#{@story.user.id}:stories_deleted", -1)
    end

    redirect_to Routes.title_path @story
  end

  def update
    if !@story.is_editable_by_user?(@user)
      flash[:error] = "You cannot edit that story."
      return redirect_to "/"
    end

    @story.last_edited_at = Time.current
    @story.is_deleted = false
    @story.editor = @user
    update_story_attributes

    if @story.save
      if @story.saved_change_to_url?
        CreateStoryCardJob.perform_later(@story)
      end

      redirect_to Routes.title_path @story
    else
      render action: "edit"
    end
  end

  def unvote
    if !(story = find_story) || story.is_gone?
      return render plain: "can't find story", status: 400
    end

    Vote.vote_thusly_on_story_or_comment_for_user_because(
      0, story.id, nil, @user.id, nil
    )

    render plain: "ok"
  end

  def upvote
    if !(story = find_story) || story.is_gone?
      return render plain: "can't find story", status: 400
    end

    if story.merged_into_story
      return render plain: "story has been merged", status: 400
    end

    Vote.vote_thusly_on_story_or_comment_for_user_because(
      1, story.id, nil, @user.id, nil
    )

    render plain: "ok"
  end

  def flag
    if !(story = find_story) || story.is_gone?
      return render plain: "can't find story", status: 400
    end

    if !Vote::STORY_REASONS[params[:reason]]
      return render plain: "invalid reason", status: 400
    end

    if !@user.can_flag?(story)
      return render plain: "not permitted to flag", status: 400
    end

    Vote.vote_thusly_on_story_or_comment_for_user_because(
      -1, story.id, nil, @user.id, params[:reason]
    )

    render plain: "ok"
  end

  def hide
    error =
      if !(story = find_story)
        "Can't find story"
      elsif story.merged_into_story
        "Story has been merged"
      end

    if error
      respond_to do |format|
        format.html {
          flash[:error] = error
          redirect_to "/"
        }
        format.json {
          render json: {message: error}, status: 400
        }
      end
      return
    end

    HiddenStory.hide_story_for_user(story, @user)

    respond_to do |format|
      format.html {
        flash[:success] = "Story hidden."
        redirect_back_or_to Routes.title_path(story)
      }
      format.json {
        render json: {hidden: true, nextAction: story_unhide_path(story.short_id)}, status: :ok
      }
    end
  end

  def unhide
    if !(story = find_story)
      error = "Can't find story"

      respond_to do |format|
        format.html {
          flash[:error] = error
          redirect_to "/"
        }
        format.json {
          render json: {message: error}, status: 400
        }
      end
      return
    end

    HiddenStory.unhide_story_for_user(story, @user)

    respond_to do |format|
      format.html {
        flash[:success] = "Story unhidden."
        redirect_back_or_to Routes.title_path(story)
      }
      format.json {
        render json: {hidden: false, nextAction: story_hide_path(story.short_id)}, status: :ok
      }
    end
  end

  def save
    error =
      if !(story = find_story)
        "Can't find story"
      elsif story.merged_into_story
        "Story has been merged"
      end

    if error
      respond_to do |format|
        format.html {
          flash[:error] = error
          redirect_to "/"
        }
        format.json {
          render json: {message: error}, status: 400
        }
      end
      return
    end

    SavedStory.save_story_for_user(story.id, @user.id)

    respond_to do |format|
      format.html {
        flash[:success] = "Story saved."
        redirect_back_or_to Routes.title_path(story)
      }
      format.json {
        render json: {saved: true, nextAction: story_unsave_path(story.short_id)}, status: :ok
      }
    end
  end

  def unsave
    if !(story = find_story)
      error = "Can't find story."

      respond_to do |format|
        format.html {
          flash[:error] = error
          redirect_to "/"
        }
        format.json {
          render json: {message: error}, status: 400
        }
      end
      return
    end

    SavedStory.where(user_id: @user.id, story_id: story.id).delete_all

    respond_to do |format|
      format.html {
        flash[:success] = "Story unsaved."
        redirect_back_or_to Routes.title_path(story)
      }
      format.json {
        render json: {saved: false, nextAction: story_save_path(story.short_id)}, status: :ok
      }
    end
  end

  def check_url_dupe
    raise ActionController::ParameterMissing.new("No URL") if params.dig(:story, :url).blank?
    @story = Story.new(user: @user)
    update_story_attributes
    update_resubmit_comment_attributes
    @story.check_already_posted_recently?

    respond_to do |format|
      linking_comments = Link.recently_linked_from_comments(@story.url)
      format.html {
        return render partial: "stories/form_errors", layout: false,
          content_type: "text/html", locals: {
            linking_comments: linking_comments,
            story: @story
          }
      }
      # json: https://github.com/lobsters/lobsters/pull/555
      format.json {
        similar_stories = @story.public_similar_stories(@user).map(&:as_json)
        render json: @story.as_json.merge(similar_stories: similar_stories)
      }
    end
  end

  def disown
    if !((story = find_story) && story.disownable_by_user?(@user))
      return render plain: "can't find story", status: 400
    end

    InactiveUser.disown! story

    redirect_to Routes.title_path story
  end

  private

  def story_params
    ps = params.require(:story).permit(:title, :url, :description, :user_is_author, :user_is_following, tags: [])
    ps[:tags] = Tag.where(tag: ps[:tags] || @story.tags.map(&:tag), active: true)
    ps
  end

  def update_story_attributes
    @story.tags_was = @story.tags.to_a
    @story.attributes = if @story.url_is_editable_by_user?(@user)
      story_params
    else
      story_params.except(:url)
    end
  end

  def update_resubmit_comment_attributes
    if @story.is_resubmit?
      @comment = @story.comments.new(user: @user)
      @comment.comment = params[:comment]
      @comment.hat = @user.wearable_hats.find_by(short_id: params[:hat_id])
    end
  end

  def find_user_story
    @story = if @user.is_moderator?
      Story.where(short_id: params[:story_id] || params[:id]).first
    else
      Story.where(user_id: @user.id, short_id: params[:story_id] || params[:id]).first
    end

    if !@story
      flash[:error] = "Could not find story or you are not authorized " \
        "to manage it."
      redirect_to "/"
      false
    end
  end

  def load_user_votes
    if @user
      @story.current_vote = Vote.find_by(user: @user, story: @story, comment: nil)

      @story.is_hidden_by_cur_user = @story.is_hidden_by_user?(@user)
      @story.is_saved_by_cur_user = @story.is_saved_by_user?(@user)
      @comments = CommentVoteHydrator.new(@comments, @user)
    end
  end

  def verify_user_can_submit_stories
    if !@user.can_submit_stories?
      flash[:error] = "You are not allowed to submit new stories."
      redirect_to "/"
    end
  end

  def track_story_reads
    @story = Story.where(short_id: params[:id]).mod_single_preload?(@user).first!
    @ribbon = ReadRibbon.where(user: @user, story: @story).first_or_initialize
    yield
    @ribbon.bump
  end
end

# typed: false

class StoriesController < ApplicationController
  include StoryFinder

  content_security_policy(only: :show) do |policy|
    policy.img_src :self, :data, -> { @story&.can_have_images? ? "https:" : "" }
  end

  caches_page :show, if: CACHE_PAGE

  before_action :require_logged_in_user_or_400,
    only: [:upvote, :flag, :unvote, :hide, :unhide, :preview, :save, :unsave]
  before_action :require_logged_in_user,
    only: [:destroy, :create, :edit, :fetch_url_attributes, :new]
  before_action :verify_user_can_submit_stories, only: [:new, :create]
  before_action :find_user_story, only: [:destroy, :edit, :undelete, :update]
  around_action :track_story_reads, only: [:show], if: -> { @user.present? }
  before_action :show_title_h1, only: [:new, :edit]

  def create
    return preview if params[:preview]

    @title = "Submit Story"

    @story = Story.new(user: @user)
    update_story_attributes
    update_resubmit_comment_attributes

    if @story.valid? &&
        !@story.already_posted_recently? &&
        (!@story.is_resubmit? || @comment.valid?)

      Story.transaction do
        if @story.save && (!@story.is_resubmit? || @comment.save)
          redirect_to Routes.title_path @story

          if !Rails.env.development?
            SendWebmentionJob.set(wait: 5.minutes).perform_later(@story)
          end

          CreateStoryCardJob.perform_later(@story)
        else
          raise ActiveRecord::Rollback
        end
      end
    elsif @story.new_user_acculturation_error
      flash[:error] = @story.errors.full_messages.join(" ")
      redirect_to mod_mail_path(id: @story.new_user_acculturation_error)
    else
      render action: "new"
    end
  end

  def destroy
    if !@story.is_editable_by_user?(@user) && !@user.is_moderator?
      flash[:error] = "You cannot edit that story."
      return redirect_to "/"
    end

    update_story_attributes
    @story.is_deleted = true
    @story.editor = @user

    if @story.save
      Keystore.increment_value_for("user:#{@story.user.id}:stories_deleted")
      Mastodon.delete_post(@story)
    end

    redirect_to Routes.title_path @story
  end

  def edit
    if !@story.is_editable_by_user?(@user)
      flash[:error] = "You cannot edit that story."
      return redirect_to "/"
    end

    @title = "Edit Story"
  end

  def fetch_url_attributes
    s = Story.new
    s.fetching_ip = request.remote_ip
    s.url = params[:fetch_url]

    render json: s.fetched_attributes
  end

  def new
    @title = "Submit Story"

    @story = Story.new(user_id: @user.id)
    @story.fetching_ip = request.remote_ip

    if params[:url].present?
      @story.url = params[:url]
      sattrs = @story.fetched_attributes

      if sattrs[:url].present? && @story.url != sattrs[:url]
        flash.now[:notice] = "Note: URL has been changed to fetched " \
          "canonicalized version"
        @story.url = sattrs[:url]
      end

      if @story.already_posted_recently?
        # user won't be able to submit this story as new, so just redirect
        # them to the previous story
        flash[:success] = "This URL has already been submitted recently."
        return redirect_to Routes.title_path @story.most_recent_similar
      end

      update_resubmit_comment_attributes

      # ignore what the user brought unless we need it as a fallback
      @story.title = sattrs[:title]
      if @story.title.blank? && params[:title].present?
        @story.title = params[:title]
      end
    end
  end

  def preview
    @story = Story.new
    update_story_attributes
    update_resubmit_comment_attributes
    @story.user_id = @user.id
    @story.previewing = true

    @story.current_vote = Vote.new(vote: 1)
    @story.score = 1

    @story.valid?
    @merged_stories = [@story]

    render action: "new", layout: !request.xhr?
  end

  def show
    # @story was already loaded by track_story_reads for logged-in users
    @story ||= Story.where(short_id: params[:id]).first!
    if @story.merged_into_story
      respond_to do |format|
        format.html {
          flash[:success] = "\"#{@story.title}\" has been merged into this story."
          return redirect_to Routes.title_path @story.merged_into_story, anchor: @story.header_anchor
        }
        format.json {
          return redirect_to(story_path(@story.merged_into_story, format: :json))
        }
      end
    end

    # if asking with a title and it's been edited, 302
    if params[:title] && params[:title] != @story.title_as_slug
      return redirect_to(Routes.title_path(@story))
    end

    if @story.is_gone?
      @moderation = Moderation
        .where(story: @story, comment: nil)
        .where("action LIKE '%deleted story%'")
        .order(id: :desc)
        .first
    end
    if !@story.can_be_seen_by_user?(@user)
      respond_to do |format|
        format.html { return render action: "_missing", status: 404, locals: {story: @story, moderation: @moderation} }
        format.json { raise ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound }
      end
    end

    @comments = Comment.story_threads(@story).for_presentation
    @read_by_notifications = @user ? Comment.where(story_id: [@story.id] + @story.merged_stories.pluck(:id)).where(id: @user.notifications.read.of_comments) : []

    @title = @story.title

    respond_to do |format|
      format.html {
        @meta_tags = [
          {property: "og:type", content: "article"},
          {property: "og:site_name", content: Rails.application.name},
          {property: "og:title", content: @story.title},
          {property: "og:description", content: @story.comments_count.to_s + " " + "comment".pluralize(@story.comments_count)},
          {property: "og:image", content: Routes.story_image_url(@story)},
          {property: "article:author", content: Routes.user_url(@story.user)}
        ]
        @meta_tags << {property: "article:author", content: "https://#{@story.user.mastodon_instance}/@#{@story.user.mastodon_username}"} if @story.user.mastodon_username.present?

        load_user_votes

        @merged_stories = [@story, @story.merged_stories.not_deleted(@user).mod_single_preload?(@user).for_presentation.includes(:votes)].flatten
        render action: "show"
      }
      format.json {
        @comments = @comments.includes(:parent_comment)
        render json: @story.as_json(with_comments: @comments)
      }
    end
  end

  def undelete
    if !(@story.is_editable_by_user?(@user) &&
    @story.is_undeletable_by_user?(@user))
      flash[:error] = "You cannot edit that story."
      return redirect_to "/"
    end

    update_story_attributes
    @story.is_deleted = false
    @story.editor = @user

    if @story.save
      Keystore.increment_value_for("user:#{@story.user.id}:stories_deleted", -1)
    end

    redirect_to Routes.title_path @story
  end

  def update
    if !@story.is_editable_by_user?(@user)
      flash[:error] = "You cannot edit that story."
      return redirect_to "/"
    end

    @story.last_edited_at = Time.current
    @story.is_deleted = false
    @story.editor = @user
    update_story_attributes

    if @story.save
      if @story.saved_change_to_url?
        CreateStoryCardJob.perform_later(@story)
      end

      redirect_to Routes.title_path @story
    else
      render action: "edit"
    end
  end

  def unvote
    if !(story = find_story) || story.is_gone?
      return render plain: "can't find story", status: 400
    end

    Vote.vote_thusly_on_story_or_comment_for_user_because(
      0, story.id, nil, @user.id, nil
    )

    render plain: "ok"
  end

  def upvote
    if !(story = find_story) || story.is_gone?
      return render plain: "can't find story", status: 400
    end

    if story.merged_into_story
      return render plain: "story has been merged", status: 400
    end

    Vote.vote_thusly_on_story_or_comment_for_user_because(
      1, story.id, nil, @user.id, nil
    )

    render plain: "ok"
  end

  def flag
    if !(story = find_story) || story.is_gone?
      return render plain: "can't find story", status: 400
    end

    if !Vote::STORY_REASONS[params[:reason]]
      return render plain: "invalid reason", status: 400
    end

    if !@user.can_flag?(story)
      return render plain: "not permitted to flag", status: 400
    end

    Vote.vote_thusly_on_story_or_comment_for_user_because(
      -1, story.id, nil, @user.id, params[:reason]
    )

    render plain: "ok"
  end

  def hide
    error =
      if !(story = find_story)
        "Can't find story"
      elsif story.merged_into_story
        "Story has been merged"
      end

    if error
      respond_to do |format|
        format.html {
          flash[:error] = error
          redirect_to "/"
        }
        format.json {
          render json: {message: error}, status: 400
        }
      end
      return
    end

    HiddenStory.hide_story_for_user(story, @user)

    respond_to do |format|
      format.html {
        flash[:success] = "Story hidden."
        redirect_back_or_to Routes.title_path(story)
      }
      format.json {
        render json: {hidden: true, nextAction: story_unhide_path(story.short_id)}, status: :ok
      }
    end
  end

  def unhide
    if !(story = find_story)
      error = "Can't find story"

      respond_to do |format|
        format.html {
          flash[:error] = error
          redirect_to "/"
        }
        format.json {
          render json: {message: error}, status: 400
        }
      end
      return
    end

    HiddenStory.unhide_story_for_user(story, @user)

    respond_to do |format|
      format.html {
        flash[:success] = "Story unhidden."
        redirect_back_or_to Routes.title_path(story)
      }
      format.json {
        render json: {hidden: false, nextAction: story_hide_path(story.short_id)}, status: :ok
      }
    end
  end

  def save
    error =
      if !(story = find_story)
        "Can't find story"
      elsif story.merged_into_story
        "Story has been merged"
      end

    if error
      respond_to do |format|
        format.html {
          flash[:error] = error
          redirect_to "/"
        }
        format.json {
          render json: {message: error}, status: 400
        }
      end
      return
    end

    SavedStory.save_story_for_user(story.id, @user.id)

    respond_to do |format|
      format.html {
        flash[:success] = "Story saved."
        redirect_back_or_to Routes.title_path(story)
      }
      format.json {
        render json: {saved: true, nextAction: story_unsave_path(story.short_id)}, status: :ok
      }
    end
  end

  def unsave
    if !(story = find_story)
      error = "Can't find story."

      respond_to do |format|
        format.html {
          flash[:error] = error
          redirect_to "/"
        }
        format.json {
          render json: {message: error}, status: 400
        }
      end
      return
    end

    SavedStory.where(user_id: @user.id, story_id: story.id).delete_all

    respond_to do |format|
      format.html {
        flash[:success] = "Story unsaved."
        redirect_back_or_to Routes.title_path(story)
      }
      format.json {
        render json: {saved: false, nextAction: story_save_path(story.short_id)}, status: :ok
      }
    end
  end

  def check_url_dupe
    raise ActionController::ParameterMissing.new("No URL") if params.dig(:story, :url).blank?
    @story = Story.new(user: @user)
    update_story_attributes
    update_resubmit_comment_attributes
    @story.check_already_posted_recently?

    respond_to do |format|
      linking_comments = Link.recently_linked_from_comments(@story.url)
      format.html {
        return render partial: "stories/form_errors", layout: false,
          content_type: "text/html", locals: {
            linking_comments: linking_comments,
            story: @story
          }
      }
      # json: https://github.com/lobsters/lobsters/pull/555
      format.json {
        similar_stories = @story.public_similar_stories(@user).map(&:as_json)
        render json: @story.as_json.merge(similar_stories: similar_stories)
      }
    end
  end

  def disown
    if !((story = find_story) && story.disownable_by_user?(@user))
      return render plain: "can't find story", status: 400
    end

    InactiveUser.disown! story

    redirect_to Routes.title_path story
  end

  private

  def story_params
    ps = params.require(:story).permit(:title, :url, :description, :user_is_author, :user_is_following, tags: [])
    ps[:tags] = Tag.where(tag: ps[:tags] || @story.tags.map(&:tag), active: true)
    ps
  end

  def update_story_attributes
    @story.tags_was = @story.tags.to_a
    @story.attributes = if @story.url_is_editable_by_user?(@user)
      story_params
    else
      story_params.except(:url)
    end
  end

  def update_resubmit_comment_attributes
    if @story.is_resubmit?
      @comment = @story.comments.new(user: @user)
      @comment.comment = params[:comment]
      @comment.hat = @user.wearable_hats.find_by(short_id: params[:hat_id])
    end
  end

  def find_user_story
    @story = if @user.is_moderator?
      Story.where(short_id: params[:story_id] || params[:id]).first
    else
      Story.where(user_id: @user.id, short_id: params[:story_id] || params[:id]).first
    end

    if !@story
      flash[:error] = "Could not find story or you are not authorized " \
        "to manage it."
      redirect_to "/"
      false
    end
  end

  def load_user_votes
    if @user
      @story.current_vote = Vote.find_by(user: @user, story: @story, comment: nil)

      @story.is_hidden_by_cur_user = @story.is_hidden_by_user?(@user)
      @story.is_saved_by_cur_user = @story.is_saved_by_user?(@user)
      @comments = CommentVoteHydrator.new(@comments, @user)
    end
  end

  def verify_user_can_submit_stories
    if !@user.can_submit_stories?
      flash[:error] = "You are not allowed to submit new stories."
      redirect_to "/"
    end
  end

  def track_story_reads
    @story = Story.where(short_id: params[:id]).mod_single_preload?(@user).first!
    @ribbon = ReadRibbon.where(user: @user, story: @story).first_or_initialize
    yield
    @ribbon.bump
  end
end

content.text: Removed the `@story.is_deleted = false` line from `StoriesController#update` (app/controllers/stories_controller.rb:220-240). Now a deleted story stays deleted when the owner edits it — attributes still update and save normally — while `undelete` (unchanged) remains the only path that clears `is_deleted`. Non-deleted stories are unaffected since that field simply isn't touched anymore.
